field.name: profit_account_id
field.attribute: country_code != 'IN' and type != 'cash' or country_code == 'IN' and type not in ['bank', 'cash', 'sale', 'purchase']

field.name: loss_account_id
field.attribute: country_code != 'IN' and type != 'cash' or country_code == 'IN' and type not in ['bank', 'cash', 'sale', 'purchase']

group.name: group_alias_no_domain
group.attribute: country_code == 'IN' or type not in ('sale', 'purchase') or display_alias_fields

group.name: group_alias_edit
group.attribute: country_code == 'IN' or type not in ('sale', 'purchase') or not display_alias_fields

group.name: group_alias_edit_general
group.attribute: country_code == 'IN' or type != 'general' or not display_alias_fields
